trigger.failure: readinessGate normalized length matched at 13601 but Linux sha256 da0dd35e... differed from the Windows baseline 6e0a7780...
trigger.passingBeforeFailure: Typecheck and lint passed; 543 test files and 1656 tests passed

scope.goal: Canonicalize fixed-width evidence file size/digest metadata and prove all eleven v2183 reports are portable in one LF-checkout run.
nonGoals: No source file under src/ changes
No renderer, loader, route, schema, fixture, or upstream contract change
No Java or mini-kv write, build, test, start, or stop
No transition into N5 before external N1-close review

necessityProof.blockerResolved: The second checkpoint run passed the versioned-path fix but stopped before build/smoke because one LF-sensitive evidence file retained equal-width size/digest values.
necessityProof.consumer: All renderer migration parity batches that expose indented evidence file metadata, plus the final N1 review checkpoint.
necessityProof.whyExistingNormalizerWasInsufficient: It normalized JSON metadata and inline bytes/digest pairs but not the report form using indented '- sizeBytes:' and '- digest:' lines.
necessityProof.stopCondition: The paired metadata unit test passes, soft assertions report no remaining drift, and the complete eleven-report parity test passes in both Windows and detached LF worktrees.

rootCause.lengthWhyEqual: The decimal byte count and sha256 digest retained identical widths on both platforms, so only the hash assertion exposed the drift.
rootCause.sourceOfDifference: CRLF/LF byte representation in the committed mini-kv v101 follow-up evidence file.

implementation.diagnosticImprovement: The v2179 and v2183 per-report parity assertions use expect.soft so one run reports every affected report instead of stopping at the first mismatch.

validation.command: Compare Windows and core.autocrlf=false readiness-gate normalized Markdown line by line
validation.result: Only sizeBytes and digest lines differed before the fix

validation.command: npx vitest run test/rendererMigrationParityUtils.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2179Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2183Parity.test.ts --maxWorkers=2 --reporter=dot in the Windows tree
validation.result: 3 files passed, 6 tests passed; all seventeen renderer cases completed

validation.command: Run the same three files after copying the repaired tests into the detached LF worktree
validation.result: 3 files passed, 6 tests passed; all seventeen renderer cases completed with no soft assertion

validation.command: Run the same three files with V8 coverage and command-local zero thresholds
validation.result: 3 files passed, 6 tests passed; repository coverage configuration remained unchanged
The outer 3600-second command budget expired without an assertion failure or file-level failure; no Vitest process remained, so this timeout was not counted as pass or fail.

screenshot.reason: This version changes test-only evidence normalization and diagnostics; it creates no HTML or UI surface.
